text: @ VPC Security Groups (5G) @ mostsancnaia @ s e STATEFUL - detect response traffic automatically ¢ Allowed (IN or OUT) request = allowed response ¢ NO EXPLICIT DENY ... only ALLOW or Implicit DENY e .. can't block specific bad actors e Supports IP/CIDR ... and logical resources e .. including other security groups AND ITSELF ¢ Attached to ENI's not instances (even if the Ul shows it this way)
